ICD Procedure3 Code This field lists the inpatient ICD and procedure 3 relevant to the plan of care. CHAR 7 x
M1012_INP_PRCDR4_ICD M1012 Inpatient ICD Procedure4 Code This field lists the inpatient ICD and procedure 4 relevant to the plan of care. CHAR 7 x
M1016_CHGREG_ICD1 M1016 (M0210) Regimen Change- Diagnosis1 ICD Code This field lists the patient's medical diagnoses and ICD9 code 1 for those conditions requiring changed medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. CHAR 7
